description: Fourth curated wave for repeated runtime review cases validated against the current dev-check corpus.

rules.reason: Repeated runtime review cases only expose GUI-oriented archive paths and no server-side evidence.
rules.notes: Promoted from the latest Prominence II and Medieval MC dev-check runs after repeated review hits around Sodium options GUI classes and assets.

rules.reason: Repeated runtime review cases align with renderer-only mixins and the legacy client blocklist signal.

rules.reason: Metadata explicitly marks the jar as shared/common; the remaining review case comes from a low-confidence legacy filename signal.
rules.notes: Promoted from the latest Prominence II dev-check run to override a weak blocklist match with stronger shared-side metadata.
